title: FastQuit-Forge
description: This mod allows you to instantly return to the title screen after clicking "Save and Quit to Title."
body:
# FastQuit-Forge  
This mod is the Forge port of [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit). Please do not report any crash logs related to this mod on the original mod's page. Instead, you can submit issues on our [issue page](https://github.com/frcvdt45g6by7hnj8ukm-nh8b7g6vtf5r4de3/FastQuit-Forge/issues).  

## Introduction  
This mod allows you to instantly return to the title screen after clicking "Save and Quit to Title." The world will be saved in the background, and it will still appear in the world list. You can edit, delete, or recreate the world while it is still saving. Additionally, the mod offers many configurable options.  

## License  
This mod is open source under the MIT license, just like the original mod.  

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/itFaO2Tg/images/88c59a3c513cd7c4b8a07203740910faba793e0c.gif)
